scenarios.title: The Quiet Village
scenarios.target: find out why no smoke has risen from Stelm village in eight days, and bring word back to the fort

contributions.line: Roselle carefully steps through the underbrush, her light-footed agility keeping her unseen as she approaches the village.
Imogen kneels among the fallen, her keen eyes reading the marks on the bodies for signs of what killed them and whether the danger still lurks.

scenarios.outcomeNarrative: The villagers were struck down swiftly and silently, most likely by a lurking predator or unseen force, explaining the silence and absence of smoke.

scenarios.title: Bread for the Yard
scenarios.target: settle the wage-riot at the Crow's Wing yard before it costs the fort its winter contracts

contributions.line: With a calm, measured voice, Imogen reminds the crowd that the fort’s promises are often hollow, but the stability of their pay depends on keeping the yard running.
Dren stands firm with his blade sheathed, eyeing the loudest men and subtly positioning himself to intervene if things turn violent.
Veska studies the crowd’s mood through her notes, quietly calculating how long the riot can be sustained before it costs the fort its contracts.

scenarios.outcomeNarrative: Imogen's words sow a cautious quiet among the crew, while Dren's watchful stance discourages escalation; Veska’s calculations confirm the riot won’t last long enough to threaten the yard's contracts.
